task: Remove apps/ChiefApp/ from the Flwntier master repo — 塔罗镜 is a separate product, not a Flwntier sub-project
summary:
Chairman correction: '塔罗牌不在主仓库吧'. I had failed to honour my own boundary.

What was wrong:
* Event 000077 (v0.3.0 commit 627e1cb) had renamed
  apps/ChiefApp/ files to '塔罗镜' and pushed a fresh
  launcher icon, but kept the entire apps/ChiefApp/
  directory (106 tracked files including the 78 image
  set + assets/cards.json + Kotlin source) in the
  Flwntier master repo. Per NWT 000071 and 000073:
  - Flwntier releases publish only Flwntier products
  - 塔罗牌 is the chairman's own smoke test / product
  - 塔罗镜 is its own independent product
    (Thatgfsj/tarot-oracle) on its own repo, with its
    own release page

So apps/ChiefApp/ should NEVER have been in the
Flwntier master in the first place. The earlier
'v0.3.0 塔罗镜' commit (627e1cb) was the right code
content but the wrong destination. This event fixes
the destination: drop the entire 106-file subtree
from apps/ChiefApp/.

What this event does:
* `git rm -r apps/ChiefApp/` — remove all 106 tracked
  files (Kotlin source, gradle scripts, assets/cards.json,
  78 drawable-nodpi/*.jpg, manifest xml, themes).
* Subsequent `git commit -m 'event 000078: ...'`.
* The corresponding source-of-truth lives at
  https://github.com/Thatgfsj/tarot-oracle (the new
  repo I created in event 000077). The 塔罗镜 APK
  is built from that repo, not from Flwntier.

What is NOT touched:
* Flwntier's own source (apps/desktop, apps/html-frontend)
  is unchanged.
* Flwntier releases (v0.4.22 NSIS) are unaffected.
* The .nwt/timeline/ files for 000068-000077 stay — they
  document the orchestrator work and the chief-app
  history. NWT 000078 supersedes event 000077's
  'the new repo is a copy' framing: 000077 should have
  removed apps/ChiefApp/ from the start; the copy
  framing was the wrong decision.

BOUNDARY (NWT 000071 + 000073 + this 000078 all hold):
* Flwntier master is a desktop product (NSIS, plus
  html-frontend cross-platform fast-path). No Android.
* 塔罗镜 is its own thing at Thatgfsj/tarot-oracle.
  The chairman can pull that repo to fix, build, or
  extend the Android app. Flwntier is hands-off.
* 塔罗牌 is still the chairman's end-to-end smoke
  test, not a Flwntier feature.

FOLLOW-UP WORK:
* NWT 000074 / 000075 / 000076 still describe the
  chief-app v0.1.0 → v0.2.1 evolution, but the actual
  code under apps/ChiefApp/ no longer exists in
  this repo. Those NWT files are historical — they
  don't claim the code lives here. The NWT 000077
  followup (a 'new repo' should be 'the' repo, not a
  copy) is now resolved by this event.

FILES TOUCHED:
* apps/ChiefApp/  (DELETED, 106 files)
* .nwt/timeline/000078.json  (this file)

ADDITIONAL NWT FIX:
* NWT 000077 description said 'The new repo's main
  branch IS the canonical source going forward (since
  the chairman said 新的)'. That was correct. But the
  *Flwntier* repo's chief-app subtree was the duplicate
  that should have been deleted at the same time. This
  event closes that gap.
reason: Chairman boundary correction. I had committed chief-app v0.3.0 changes to the Flwntier master repo (commit 627e1cb) while ALSO publishing the same code as a new Thatgfsj/tarot-oracle repo (event 000077). Per NWT 000071, the Flwntier master releases publish only Flwntier products — the chief-app (now 塔罗镜) doesn't belong here. Removing it now.
